SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-12-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-12-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF MEGHAN KANODIA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CUTTING EDGE DRAPERY IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY DAN FILIPPI, OWNER. DEFENDANT DAN FILIPPI IS PRESENT ON HIS OWN BEHALF. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE FOR DAN FILIPPI. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE OF THE CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KANODIA, MEGHAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CUTTING EDGE DRAPERY FILIPPI, DAN $7,343.19 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,518.19 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CUTTING EDGE DRAPERY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-12-2017 - JUDGMENT.
